summary: Comprehensive testing of About Page, Hero Text, Questions System, and White-Label features completed. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. The site is now fully white-labeled with Shalom Learning branding.
passed_tests: GET /api/courses/{id}/questions - Returns questions list
POST /api/courses/{id}/questions - Requires authentication
POST /api/courses/{id}/questions - Requires course purchase
GET /api/admin/questions - Returns all questions (admin only)
GET /api/admin/questions - Requires admin token
PUT /api/admin/questions/{id}/answer - Endpoint exists
DELETE /api/admin/questions/{id} - Endpoint exists
POST /api/admin/questions/send-email - Endpoint exists
Full question flow: create -> answer -> delete
API root returns Shalom Learning branding
Frontend: Page title is 'Shalom Learning'
Frontend: Hero text does NOT contain 'para brasileiros'
Frontend: Hero text contains 'tecnologia e idiomas'
Frontend: Footer does NOT contain Emergent branding
Frontend: About link navigates to /about
Frontend: About page shows 'Jean Mary Jeanlus'
Frontend: About page mentions 'Mastercard'
Frontend: About page shows skills (Python, SQL)
Frontend: About page shows languages spoken
Frontend: About page translated to English
Frontend: About page translated to French
Frontend: About page translated to Haitian Creole
Frontend: Admin Questions tab exists and shows questions
Frontend: Admin can see question with user info and course name
Frontend: Admin has Responder (Answer) button
Frontend: Admin has Email button
Frontend: Admin has Deletar (Delete) button
Frontend: CourseDetail shows 'Voce possui este curso' badge
Frontend: CourseDetail shows Duvidas tab for purchased course
Frontend: Question input field exists
Frontend: Submit question button exists
Frontend: Question submitted successfully with toast notification
critical_code_review_comments: About page implementation is complete with full bio of Jean Mary Jeanlus
All 5 languages (PT, EN, FR, ES, HT) have proper translations for About page
Hero text correctly shows 'Cursos de tecnologia e idiomas' without 'para brasileiros'
Questions system fully functional: students can ask, admin can answer/delete/email
White-label complete: No Emergent branding, title is 'Shalom Learning'
Admin panel shows pending questions count with red badge
seed_data_creation: Test question created by testcoupon@test.com in Python para Iniciantes course
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: About page with Jean Mary Jeanlus bio (translated in 5 languages), Hero text without 'para brasileiros', Questions system (student ask, admin answer/delete/email), White-label (no Emergent badge, title is Shalom Learning). Test user testcoupon@test.com has Python course and created a test question.
